title: Bitstring Status List Entry Reference
description: Validates a BitstringStatusListEntry status reference. Identifies the position of this credential in a W3C Bitstring Status List credential.

id.description: URI uniquely identifying this status entry within the status list credential

type.description: Fixed type discriminator for this status mechanism

statusListIndex.description: Non-negative integer (as string) — the bit position in the status list

statusListCredential.description: URI of the Verifiable Credential that contains the status list bitstring

statusSize.description: Number of bits allocated per status entry (default 1 for revocation)

statusMessage.description: Status value meanings, used when statusSize > 1
